title: Airport tender: third time lucky?
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Political instability, changes in senior management, and a lack of commercial capabilities have contributed to what Steve Pattinson described as a \"messy process and inability\" to finalise the Plettenberg Bay Airport tender, in a report he submitted to the Plettenberg Bay Ratepayers Association.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Political instability, changes in senior management, and a lack of commercial capabilities have contributed to what Steve Pattinson described as a \"messy process and inability\" to finalise the Plettenberg Bay Airport tender, in a report he submitted to the Plettenberg Bay Ratepayers Association."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Pattinson, who is chairperson of the Hangars Association and a former chairperson of the Ratepayers Association, said there is now a rush to issue the new tender."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The long-term lease tender for the sustainable use and development of the airport was cancelled on 15 December 2025, following the publication of the new supply chain management requirements on 9 December 2025.","html":"The long-term lease tender for the sustainable use and development of the airport was cancelled on 15 December 2025, following the publication of the new supply chain management requirements on 9 December 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The main change in the tender specification is a reduction of the required bank guarantee, from R200m to R50m.","html":"The main change in the tender specification is a reduction of the required bank guarantee, from R200m to R50m."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Key tender components"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pattinson listed the key elements of the tender as:","html":"Pattinson listed the key elements of the tender as:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• A 30-year lease agreement","html":"• A 30-year lease agreement"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Upgrades to the runway to achieve a category five licence within three years","html":"• Upgrades to the runway to achieve a category five licence within three years"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• New agreements with providers of scheduled services","html":"• New agreements with providers of scheduled services"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Negotiated leases with the 41 existing hangar owners","html":"• Negotiated leases with the 41 existing hangar owners"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• A detailed service level agreement (SLA) outlining investments, timelines, performance criteria, and employment opportunities for residents.","html":"• A detailed service level agreement (SLA) outlining investments, timelines, performance criteria, and employment opportunities for residents."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Timeline and managementThe tender was issued on 9 December 2025, with a closing date of 30 January 2026. The airport licence with the South African Civil Aviation Authority (SACAA) expires on 31 March. A compulsory site meeting for interested parties was to take place on 14 January.","html":"Timeline and management
The tender was issued on 9 December 2025, with a closing date of 30 January 2026. The airport licence with the South African Civil Aviation Authority (SACAA) expires on 31 March. A compulsory site meeting for interested parties was to take place on 14 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Pattinson praised the airport's current manager, Esmaralda Barnes, noting her 30 years of experience in national and international airports."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Bitou is fortunate to have an experienced airport manager,\" he said. \"Historically this has been an area of weakness, but the airport is now in the hands of a competent manager. We are hopeful that Bitou will lean heavily on Esmaralda's skillset in the appointment of an airport operator.\"","html":"\"Bitou is fortunate to have an experienced airport manager,\" he said. \"Historically this has been an area of weakness, but the airport is now in the hands of a competent manager. We are hopeful that Bitou will lean heavily on Esmaralda's skillset in the appointment of an airport operator.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The management of the relationship with the SACAA is critical.\"","html":"The management of the relationship with the SACAA is critical.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Previous operator"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pattinson's report notes that in February 2025, a year after rsa.Aero (Garden Route Aero) was appointed to operate the airport, Bitou Council resolved to terminate the contract with a final settlement payment of R1,8m, citing alleged contractual breaches and difficulties agreeing on an SLA. Legal fees incurred during the process were reported at approximately R3m.","html":"Pattinson's report notes that in February 2025, a year after rsa.Aero (Garden Route Aero) was appointed to operate the airport, Bitou Council resolved to terminate the contract with a final settlement payment of R1,8m, citing alleged contractual breaches and difficulties agreeing on an SLA. Legal fees incurred during the process were reported at approximately R3m."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The report states that a new tender process was subsequently initiated. In July 2025, a briefing session was held with new bidders."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The tender document addressed issues from the previous contract but initially included a R200m bank guarantee requirement. Pattinson said that requests to relax this financial requirement were refused, which contributed to delays.","html":"The tender document addressed issues from the previous contract but initially included a R200m bank guarantee requirement. Pattinson said that requests to relax this financial requirement were refused, which contributed to delays."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"New tenderFour bids were submitted in early September 2025, but none met the bank guarantee requirement, although assurances of financing capabilities were provided.","html":"New tender
Four bids were submitted in early September 2025, but none met the bank guarantee requirement, although assurances of financing capabilities were provided."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality decided in December 2025 to cancel the tender and start a new public process. The revised tender has relaxed the financial requirements. Pattinson said the intention was a speedy review and appointment of the airport operator.","html":"The municipality decided in December 2025 to cancel the tender and start a new public process. The revised tender has relaxed the financial requirements. Pattinson said the intention was a speedy review and appointment of the airport operator."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Alternative proposals"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Some interested parties have submitted proposals suggesting a separation of airport operations from runway funding, which would alter the traditional model in which non-scheduled general operations subsidise scheduled services.","html":"Some interested parties have submitted proposals suggesting a separation of airport operations from runway funding, which would alter the traditional model in which non-scheduled general operations subsidise scheduled services."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"An aviation expert cited in the report said, \"If Bitou wants scheduled services, then the government or airlines must find separate funding for these on a separate business case\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bitou Municipality was approached for comment last week, but has not responded at the time of going to press.","html":"Bitou Municipality was approached for comment last week, but has not responded at the time of going to press."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plettenberg Bay Airport's terminal building. Photo: Chris van Gass","html":"Plettenberg Bay Airport's terminal building. Photo: Chris van Gass"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
